member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.ICurrentUserService
member.summary: Provides the authenticated user's identity without coupling application code to HTTP.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.ICurrentUserService.UserId
member.summary: Gets the authenticated user's identifier, or when unavailable.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.ICurrentUserService.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets the authenticated user's display name, or when unavailable.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.ICurrentUserService.Email
member.summary: Gets the authenticated user's email address, or when unavailable.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.ICurrentUserService.Roles
member.summary: Gets the authenticated user's distinct assigned roles.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.ICurrentUserService.IsAuthenticated
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current principal is authenticated.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.ICurrentUserService.HasRole(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the current user belongs to the specified application role.
member.returns: when the current user has the role.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.ICurrentUserService.HasClaim(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the current user has a claim and, optionally, a specific value.
member.param: An optional claim value to match.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.IIdentityService
member.summary: Defines authentication operations without exposing ASP.NET Identity.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.IIdentityService.LoginAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates credentials and issues an access and refresh token pair.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.IIdentityService.RefreshAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rotates an active refresh token and issues a new token pair.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.IIdentityService.RevokeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Revokes a refresh token when it exists.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.IUserManagementService
member.summary: Defines administrator user-management operations without exposing ASP.NET Identity types.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.IUserManagementService.GetUsersAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns one filtered and paginated user page.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.IUserManagementService.GetUserByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns one user by identifier.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.IUserManagementService.GetUsersByIdsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns safe user projections for the requested identifiers.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.IUserManagementService.SetEnabledAsync(System.Guid,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enables or disables one user.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Identity.IUserManagementService.AssignRoleAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds one valid application role without removing existing roles.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Lessons.IMarkdownRenderer
member.summary: Renders Markdown source into sanitized HTML.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Lessons.IMarkdownRenderer.Render(System.String)
member.summary: Renders safe HTML from Markdown source.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Lessons.IVideoEmbedResolver
member.summary: Validates video source URLs and produces trusted playback data.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Lessons.IVideoEmbedResolver.Resolve(System.String)
member.summary: Resolves a source URL without performing network access.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Lessons.VideoEmbedResult
member.summary: Contains normalized, server-derived video playback data.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Lessons.VideoEmbedResult.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Contains normalized, server-derived video playback data.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.ICommand`1
member.summary: Marks a request that changes application state.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.ICommandDispatcher
member.summary: Dispatches commands through the configured application pipeline before invoking their handlers.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.ICommandDispatcher.SendAsync``2(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dispatches a command through its pipeline and returns its result.
member.param: The token used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The result produced by the command pipeline.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.ICommandHandler`2
member.summary: Handles a state-changing request.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.ICommandHandler`2.HandleAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the command asynchronously.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.ICommandPipelineBehavior`2
member.summary: Defines a component that runs before and/or after a command handler.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.ICommandPipelineBehavior`2.HandleAsync(`0,LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.CommandHandlerDelegate{`1},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes a command and optionally invokes the next pipeline component.
member.param: The next component in the command pipeline.
The token used to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.CommandHandlerDelegate`1
member.summary: Represents the next executable component in a Result-based command pipeline.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.IQuery`1
member.summary: Marks a request that reads application state.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.IQueryHandler`2
member.summary: Handles a read-only request.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Messaging.IQueryHandler`2.HandleAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the query asynchronously.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Networking.IClientIpAddressProvider
member.summary: Provides the current client IP address without exposing HTTP abstractions to Application.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Networking.IClientIpAddressProvider.IpAddress
member.summary: Gets the normalized client IP address or a stable fallback when no client address exists.

member.summary: Provides the current time through an abstraction suitable for deterministic testing.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Application.Abstractions.Time.ISystemClock.UtcNow
member.summary: Gets the current UTC date and time.

member.summary: Represents safe context construction.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationClaimTypes
member.summary: Defines stable claim names shared by token generation and authorization consumers.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationClaimTypes.UserId
member.summary: Identifies the user and maps to the JWT subject claim.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationClaimTypes.DisplayName
member.summary: Contains the user's display name.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationClaimTypes.Email
member.summary: Contains the user's email address.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationClaimTypes.Role
member.summary: Contains one application role per claim.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationClaimTypes.Permission
member.summary: Reserved for future permission-based authorization.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationClaimTypes.JwtId
member.summary: Identifies an individual JWT.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationClaimTypes.IssuedAt
member.summary: Contains the JWT issue time as a NumericDate value.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationRoles
member.summary: Defines the application roles recognized by LearningPortal authorization.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationRoles.Administrator
member.summary: Identifies administrators with full portal access.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationRoles.Instructor
member.summary: Identifies instructors who create courses, manage lessons, and view students.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationRoles.Student
member.summary: Identifies students who enroll, learn, and take quizzes.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationRoles.All
member.summary: Gets every role that may be created or assigned by the application.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.ApplicationRoles.IsValid(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether a role name belongs to the application role allowlist.
member.returns: when the role name is recognized.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.Policies
member.summary: Defines stable names for application authorization policies.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.Policies.AdminOnly
member.summary: Requires the Administrator role.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.Policies.InstructorOnly
member.summary: Requires the Instructor role or the full-access Administrator role.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.Policies.StudentOnly
member.summary: Requires the Student role or the full-access Administrator role.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Application.Authorization.Policies.AdminOrInstructor
member.summary: Requires either the Administrator or Instructor role.

member.summary: Validates commands before their handlers execute and returns failed Results for invalid requests.
